aliases: zip; zipper assembly
repairability_notes: A broken zipper can make a garment or bag unusable even when the rest is intact.
suggested_alternative: Use a standard stitched zipper that can be replaced by a repair shop.

aliases: clip buckle; metal buckle; plastic buckle
repairability_notes: Buckles are common failure points on bags, belts, and straps.
suggested_alternative: Use a standard buckle size attached with repairable stitching or screws.

aliases: buttons; press stud; snap button
repairability_notes: Buttons are small parts but can affect whether a product remains usable.
suggested_alternative: Use standard replaceable buttons or switches that can be accessed without damaging the product.

aliases: shoe sole; outsole; midsole
repairability_notes: Shoes are often discarded when soles wear out.
suggested_alternative: Use stitched or replaceable soles rather than permanently glued-only construction.

aliases: bag strap; watch strap; shoulder strap
repairability_notes: A failed strap can make a bag, watch, or accessory unusable.
suggested_alternative: Use removable or stitched strap attachments that can be replaced.

aliases: seam; thread; sewn seam
repairability_notes: Repairable stitching can extend garment and accessory life.
suggested_alternative: Use reinforced stitching and avoid hidden bonding where repair access matters.

aliases: clip; latch; fastener clasp
repairability_notes: Clasps are often small but critical usability components.
suggested_alternative: Use a standard clasp that can be replaced without damaging the product.

aliases: lithium-ion battery; battery pack; rechargeable cell
repairability_notes: Battery degradation is a major reason electronics are replaced.
suggested_alternative: Use a screwed or clipped battery module with safe access and standard dimensions.

aliases: display; LCD; OLED; touchscreen
repairability_notes: Cracked or failed screens often drive premature replacement.
suggested_alternative: Use a modular screen assembly that can be replaced without replacing the full device.

aliases: printed circuit board; circuit board; control board
repairability_notes: Board-level repair is difficult if assemblies are sealed, potted, or proprietary.
suggested_alternative: Use connector-based modular boards with accessible fasteners.

aliases: USB-C port; power port; connector port
repairability_notes: Ports wear out and should not require full board replacement if avoidable.
suggested_alternative: Use a standard port on a replaceable daughterboard or accessible module.

aliases: plastic casing; plastic housing; ABS enclosure
repairability_notes: The enclosure determines whether internal repair access is possible.
suggested_alternative: Use screws, clips, or visible service access instead of glued or sealed housings.

aliases: aluminum casing; metal enclosure; aluminium shell
repairability_notes: Durable casing can support long product life if it allows service access.
suggested_alternative: Avoid permanent bonding; use accessible screws or clips.

aliases: driver; audio speaker; speaker module
repairability_notes: Speakers can fail from wear, moisture, or impact.
suggested_alternative: Use a replaceable speaker module with standard connectors.

aliases: wire; wiring harness; flex cable; power cable
repairability_notes: Cables and connectors are common failure points.
suggested_alternative: Use connectorised cables rather than permanently soldered or glued cable assemblies.

aliases: sensor module; temperature sensor; motion sensor
repairability_notes: Sensors should be replaceable when they control core product function.
suggested_alternative: Use a standard replaceable sensor module with accessible connectors.

aliases: electric motor; drive motor; appliance motor
repairability_notes: Motor failure can make the whole appliance unusable.
suggested_alternative: Use a standard motor size with accessible fasteners and documented replacement path.

aliases: heater; coil; heating coil
repairability_notes: Heating elements are common failure points in kettles, toasters, dryers, and heaters.
suggested_alternative: Use a replaceable heating module with safe service access.

aliases: cutting blade; blender blade; fan blade
repairability_notes: Blades dull, crack, or wear before the whole appliance fails.
suggested_alternative: Use a replaceable blade assembly with standard fasteners.

aliases: water pump; fluid pump; air pump
repairability_notes: Pump failure can make coffee machines, cleaners, and dispensers unusable.
suggested_alternative: Use a standard replaceable pump module with accessible hose connections.

aliases: air filter; water filter; dust filter
repairability_notes: Filters are expected consumables and should be easily replaceable by users.
suggested_alternative: Use standard, user-replaceable filters with clear access.

aliases: power switch; control switch; push switch
repairability_notes: Switch failure can disable an otherwise working product.
suggested_alternative: Use a standard switch module accessible from a serviceable enclosure.

aliases: mains cable; appliance cable; AC cord
repairability_notes: Damaged power cords are common and should not require replacing the whole product.
suggested_alternative: Use a replaceable cord or accessible strain relief and connector design.

aliases: fan assembly; impeller; blower
repairability_notes: Fan failure can reduce performance or make products unusable.
suggested_alternative: Use a standard replaceable fan module with accessible fasteners.

aliases: housing; shell; enclosure
repairability_notes: The casing determines whether the product can be opened for repair.
suggested_alternative: Use screws or clips and avoid sealed or glued-only casing designs.

aliases: fastener; machine screw; self-tapping screw
repairability_notes: Standard screws improve disassembly, maintenance, and repair access.
suggested_alternative: Prefer standard screws over glue, rivets, or permanent bonding.

aliases: seal; rubber gasket; silicone gasket
repairability_notes: Worn gaskets can cause leaks or performance loss.
suggested_alternative: Use a standard replaceable gasket instead of bonding it permanently.
